content:
Commit `d73f868f` pushed successfully to `3403-update-homepage-welcome-text`.

**Summary:** Changed `src/app/(frontend)/page.tsx:30` — updated the unauthenticated homepage welcome text from `"Welcome to your new project."` to `"Welcome from kody — verify run 1778699807093"`. The draft PR #3404 now includes this commit and Vercel will redeploy the preview URL.
